# Alfred Nutile

> Builder at DailyAi.Studio. I build no-code & AI automations that actually ship — n8n, workflows, and the occasional comic for fun. Open for AI automation work.

Alfred Nutile is a builder and AI automation consultant operating as DailyAi.Studio (Sundance Solutions, LLC). This is his personal links/landing page.

## Work with me

- [AI & automation consulting](mailto:info@dailyai.studio?subject=AI%20%26%20automation%20consulting): Email to start a project — AI & automation consulting.
- [Book a call](https://calendar.app.google/puo3MUz7bZ1xD41e6): Grab a slot on my calendar.
